title.en: Why European backlash over Trump intervention won't worry Infantino
title.zh-CN: 为什么欧洲对特朗普干预的强烈反对不会让Infantino感到担忧

summary.en: After 10 years as Fifa president, could the Folarin Balogun controversy tip the balance against Gianni Infantino? Don't bet on it.
summary.zh-CN: 在担任国际足联主席10年后， Folarin Balogun的争议能否打破对Gianni Infantino的平衡？不要下注。

title.en: James expected to return for Norway quarter-final
title.zh-CN: 詹姆斯有望回归挪威四分之一决赛

summary.en: England manager Thomas Tuchel expects Reece James to be available for the World Cup quarter-final against Norway on Saturday.
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰主教练托马斯·图切尔（ Thomas Tuchel ）预计，里斯·詹姆斯（ Reece James ）将在周六对阵挪威的世界杯四

title.en: Mbappe condemns racist posts from Paraguay senator
title.zh-CN: 姆巴佩谴责巴拉圭参议员的种族主义帖子

summary.en: France forward Kylian Mbappe condemns a Paraguayan senator as "despicable" and unworthy of her position after she made a number of racist remarks mocking his origin and education.
summary.zh-CN: 法国前锋基利安·姆巴佩（ Kylian Mbappe ）在嘲笑巴拉圭参议员的出身和教育后发表了一系列种族主义言论，谴责巴拉圭参议员“卑鄙” ，不值得她的立场。

title.en: How England used five mini games to beat Mexico
title.zh-CN: 英格兰如何用五场迷你比赛击败墨西哥

summary.en: The tactical breakdown of how Thomas Tuchel's 10-man England pulled off a remarkable World Cup win in a hostile Mexico City.
summary.zh-CN: 托马斯·图切尔（ Thomas Tuchel ）的10人英格兰队在充满敌意的墨西哥城取得了非凡的世界杯胜利的战术崩溃。

title.en: Spain into quarter-finals after Merino's late winner against Portugal
title.zh-CN: 西班牙在梅里诺战胜葡萄牙后进入四分之一决赛

summary.en: Spain leave it late as super-sub Mikel Merino scores a stoppage-time winner to send his side into the quarter-finals, ending Cristiano Ronaldo's hopes of World Cup glory.
summary.zh-CN: 西班牙队离开得很晚，因为超级球员米克尔·梅里诺（ Mikel Merino ）获得了暂停赛冠军，将他的球队送入四分之一决赛，结束了克里斯蒂亚诺·罗纳尔多（ Cristiano Ronaldo ）对世界杯

title.en: How England's epic night at the Azteca unfolded
title.zh-CN: 英格兰史诗般的阿兹特克之夜是如何展开的

summary.en: Relive all the drama from England’s 3-2 win over Mexico, as Thomas Tuchel’s team progressed to a quarter-final meeting with Norway on Saturday.
summary.zh-CN: 周六，托马斯·图切尔（ Thomas Tuchel ）的球队与挪威队进行了四分之一决赛，重温了英格兰队以3比2战胜墨西哥队的所有戏剧性事件。

title.en: Bellingham scores two in 98 seconds to silence the Azteca
title.zh-CN: 贝灵汉在98秒内以2分击败阿兹特克

summary.en: Jude Bellingham scores two goals in 98 seconds to give England a 2-0 lead over Mexico during their last 16 match at the Mexico City Stadium.
summary.zh-CN: 裘德·贝林汉姆（ Jude Bellingham ）在墨西哥城体育场的最后16场比赛中，在98秒内打进2球，让英格兰队以2比0领先

title.en: 'Nasty, nasty challenge' - Quansah shown red card
title.zh-CN: “讨厌，讨厌的挑战” - Quansah出示红牌

summary.en: England are reduced to 10 men as Jarrel Quansah is shown a red card following a VAR review for a "nasty" challenge on Mexico's Jesus Gallardo.
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰队减少到10人，因为Jarrel Quansah在墨西哥的Jesus Gallardo进行了“令人讨厌”的挑战后，在VAR评论后显示了一张红牌。

title.en: Where does Mexico win rank among England's best results?
title.zh-CN: 墨西哥在哪里赢得英格兰最好的成绩？

summary.en: BBC Sport looks at some of England's most famous away victories after their epic win against Mexico at the Azteca - plus you can have your say.
summary.zh-CN: 英国广播公司体育频道（ BBC Sport ）回顾了英格兰在阿兹特克（ Azteca ）战胜墨西哥后取得的一些最著名的客场胜利-此外，您还可以发表意见。

title.en: After a year of ICE raids, Southern California finds joy in Mexico's World Cup run
title.zh-CN: 经过一年的ICE突袭，南加州在墨西哥的世界杯比赛中找到了乐趣

summary.en: For Mexico's football-loving community, the World Cup has been a triumph, despite their last-16 exit. The joy has spread to Southern California, home to one of the largest Mexican communities outside...
summary.zh-CN: 对于热爱足球的墨西哥社区来说，世界杯是一次胜利，尽管他们在过去16场比赛中退出。欢乐已经蔓延到南加州，这里是外面最大的墨西哥社区之一……

title.en: Who produced another iconic performance? England player ratings
title.zh-CN: 谁制作了另一场标志性的表演？英格兰球员评分

summary.en: BBC Sport England reporter Alex Howell rates how the Three Lions players performed in the last-16 win over Mexico.
summary.zh-CN: 英国广播公司体育英格兰记者亚历克斯·豪威尔（ Alex Howell ）对三狮队球员在过去16场战胜墨西哥的比赛中的

title.en: Brentford set to sign Wilson after West Ham exit
title.zh-CN: 布伦特福德将在西汉姆退出后签下威尔逊

summary.en: Brentford are set to sign former England striker Callum Wilson on an initial 12-month contract after his exit from relegated West Ham.
summary.zh-CN: 布伦特福德将在退出降级的西汉姆后签下前英格兰前锋卡勒姆·威尔逊，最初合同为12个月。

title.en: Arsenal sign Germany striker Cerci on free
title.zh-CN: 阿森纳免费签下德国前锋塞尔西

summary.en: Arsenal have confirmed the signing of Germany striker Selina Cerci from Hoffenheim on a free transfer.
summary.zh-CN: 阿森纳已经确认了德国前锋塞琳娜·塞尔西（ Selina Cerci ）从霍芬海姆（ Hoffenheim ）签下免费转会。

title.en: England into quarter-finals - what is their path to the final?
title.zh-CN: 英格兰进入四分之一决赛-他们进入决赛的道路是什么？

summary.en: BBC Sport takes a look at what England will need to do to reach the final after progressing the quarter-finals.
summary.zh-CN: 英国广播公司体育台（ BBC Sport ）了解英格兰队在进入四分之一决赛后需要做些什么才能进入决赛。

title.zh-CN: 西班牙防守队员追逐世界杯历史背后的数字

summary.en: With Spain yet to concede at the 2026 World Cup and on the brink of another tournament record, BBC Sport examines the numbers behind the shutouts.
summary.zh-CN: 由于西班牙尚未在2026年世界杯和另一项锦标赛纪录的边缘让步， BBC Sport检查了关闭背后的数字。

summary.en: A very hoarse sounding England captain Harry Kane gives his reaction to England's 3-2 victory over Mexico and praises the fans support.

summary.en: Watch how Erling Haaland's hometown of Bryne reacted to their hero scoring both goals as Norway knocked out Brazil to advance to the quarter-final of the World Cup.

summary.en: Erling Haaland has scored seven goals in four World Cup games and he is the striker that nobody wants to face as he fires Norway into an historic quarter-final.

summary.en: There was nothing unlucky about Brazil's loss to Norway in the last 16 of the World Cup and their exit at this stage is an unmitigated disaster, writes Tim Vickery.

summary.en: Gary Neville said England will be favourites against Norway but urged caution over Erling Haaland's potential impact despite the euphoria after their victory over Mexico in the World Cup last 16.
